mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO henan_trade_anno (id, anno_type, title, content, trade_region, trade_region_code, project_name, project_type, project_code, create_time, info_url) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.annoType}, #{item.title}, #{item.content}, #{item.tradeRegion}, #{item.tradeRegionCode}, #{item.projectName}, #{item.projectType}, #{item.projectCode}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.infoUrl})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM henan_trade_anno WHERE id = #{id}
